email.notes: Only include emails whose domain matches the whitelist. Capture named groups: user, domain.

url.notes: Match only HTTPS URLs. Capture host (without scheme/port) and optional path (beginning with slash). Exclude http.

order_id.notes: Order IDs look like ORD-YYYY-MM-DD-XXXXXX where X is uppercase alphanumeric. Named groups: year, month, day, code.

ipv4_public.notes: Capture IPv4 octets with named groups a,b,c,d. Exclude common private, loopback, and all-zero/all-ones addresses.

phone.notes: Normalize US phone numbers to +1-AAA-BBB-CCCC using regex find-replace with backreferences. Do not modify any other text.
